title: CLI Agent: report.system.cpu
description: CPU and load average metrics collected by the Honeybadger CLI agent. Emitted once per reporting interval.

host.description: Hostname of the machine running the agent.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp set by the CLI agent at collection time.

used_percent.description: CPU usage as a percentage (0.0–100.0), rounded to 2 decimal places.
